title: Trade Financer Raistone to Liquidate After First Brands Blowup
description: Raistone Capital, a trade finance firm that was done in by the collapse of auto parts supplier First Brands Group, filed for liquidation on Monday, weeks after winding down its operations.
content: Raistone Capital, a trade finance firm that was done in by the collapse of auto parts supplier First Brands Group, filed for liquidation on Monday, weeks after winding down its operations.
